  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActiveSkill
    An interface or base class for skills that require player activation.
    AdrenalSyringe
    An equipment item that provides a burst of healing or emergency power.
    Arrow
    A linear projectile fired by bows or similar weapons.
    Aura
    A weapon that creates a damaging area of effect around the player.
    BiocatalystCore
    A core upgrade that uses biological effects to poison or weaken enemies.
    Boomerang
    A projectile that travels outward and then returns towards its origin.
    BoomerangWeapon
    A weapon that throws a boomerang projectile which returns to the player.
    Boss
    An advanced enemy with unique attacks, higher health, and distinct phases.
    Boss.BossState
     
    Bow
    A ranged weapon that shoots arrows at enemies.
    Camera
    Manages the viewpoint of the game, keeping the player focused on the screen.
    ChaosCore
    A core upgrade that introduces chaotic and unpredictable effects.
    Charger
    An enemy that aggressively charges towards the player to deal damage.
    Chest
    A collectable object that drops valuable items or power-ups when opened.
    Collectable
    An interface for items that the player can pick up in the game world.
    CompareEnemies
    A utility class for comparing and sorting enemies, often used for targeting.
    Controller
    Handles user input from the keyboard or mouse to control the game.
    CrossSlash
    A skill representing a cross-shaped slash attack.
    CryptoCore
    A core upgrade that provides defensive or evasive enhancements.
    DamageText
    A visual indicator that displays the amount of damage dealt to an entity.
    DataCore
    A core upgrade that enhances data processing or tech-based abilities.
    DataFragment
    An equipment item providing incremental tech bonuses.
    DeepestVoid
    An equipment item that utilizes black hole or gravity mechanics.
    Doomsday
    An equipment item that unleashes massive destruction when triggered.
    DynamoCore
    A core upgrade that focuses on energy generation and electrical attacks.
    Enemy
    The base abstract class for all hostile entities in the game.
    EnergyDrink
    A power-up item that restores energy or stamina.
    EngineOverload
    An equipment item that temporarily boosts speed and damage.
    EntropyCore
    A core upgrade that causes lingering deterioration on enemies.
    Experience
    A collectable item that grants experience points to the player upon pickup.
    Explosion
    A class representing an explosive effect that damages entities in an area.
    FinalWeapon
    An extremely powerful equipment item representing the ultimate arsenal.
    FractalCore
    A core upgrade that multiplies or splits projectiles and effects.
    GameAssets
    A centralized manager for loading and providing all game resources like images and fonts.
    GameEngine
    The core engine that runs the game loop, handling updates and rendering.
    GameLauncher
    The entry point for the application, initializing the game window and assets.
    GameObject
    The base class for all entities in the game, providing common properties like position and size.
    HexEditor
    An equipment item that modifies or corrupts enemy data.
    Item
    The base interface or class for all items that can be collected or equipped.
    ItemManager
    Manages the spawning, updating, and logic of all items in the game.
    ItemRarity
    Defines the different levels of rarity for items in the game.
    JumpingSlash
    A skill representing a jumping slash attack.
    KineticCore
    A core upgrade that increases the physical force and knockback of attacks.
    LightningEffect
    A visual and damaging effect representing a lightning strike.
    LightningWeapon
    A weapon that strikes enemies with lightning bolts.
    MagneticRepulsor
    An equipment item that pushes enemies away from the player.
    MagnetRing
    An equipment item that increases the pickup range for collectables.
    Main
    The bootstrap class for the JavaFX application.
    Main.GameState
     
    MatrixCore
    A core upgrade that manipulates space or enemy positioning.
    MutatedBrain
    An equipment item that enhances skill effectiveness or reduces cooldowns.
    NecroticHeart
    An equipment item that grants power at the cost of health or causes decay.
    NeuroAmplifier
    An equipment item that boosts mental or magical capabilities.
    Obstacle
    Represents an obstacle in the game world that entities might collide with.
    OrbitRock
    A weapon that summons rocks orbiting the player to damage nearby enemies.
    OverClockCore
    A core upgrade that increases attack speed and reduces cooldowns.
    OverHeatCore
    A core upgrade that sacrifices defense or health for extreme damage output.
    ParasiticGas
    An equipment item that emits a toxic cloud damaging nearby enemies.
    PhantomDrive
    An equipment item that provides evasion or phasing abilities.
    PlasmaCore
    A core upgrade that melts enemies with high-temperature energy.
    Player
    The main class representing the user-controlled character, managing health, stats, and input.
    Player.MovementState
     
    PlayerTrail
    A visual effect class representing the trail left behind by the player.
    Projectile
    The base class for all moving projectiles fired by weapons or skills.
    Rarity
    Interface or base class for defining the rarity characteristics of game weapons.
    Renderable
    An interface for any game object that can be drawn on the screen.
    ResonanceCore
    A core upgrade that amplifies damage based on consecutive hits.
    Rock
    A basic projectile representing a thrown rock or fireball.
    ServoMotor
    An equipment item that enhances movement speed or attack rate.
    SiphonCore
    A core upgrade that heals the player based on damage dealt.
    Slash
    A basic skill representing a standard slash attack.
    SomaticCore
    A core upgrade that enhances physical attributes and recovery.
    SoulHarvester
    An equipment item that gains strength by defeating enemies.
    SoundManager
    Handles the loading and playback of all audio effects and background music.
    Steak
    A power-up item that restores a large amount of health, the picture shows a banana.
    SurgeCore
    A core upgrade that provides bursts of power and damage.
    Sword
    A melee weapon used for close-range combat.
    TitaniumArmor
    A defensive equipment item that reduces incoming damage.
    TungstenPlating
    An equipment item that significantly increases armor and defense.
    Ultimate
    A powerful ultimate skill that deals significant damage.
    VectorCore
    A core upgrade that enhances projectile speed and direction.
    Weapon
    The base abstract class for all player weapons, handling firing logic and upgrades.
    Weapon.AmountType
     
    WeaponType
    Enumeration of the different categories or types of weapons available.
    World
    The main container class representing the game state, including entities, map, and collision.
